title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.486 - Army SGT Timothy J Sutton Memorial Highway designated for portion of U.S. Highway 60 in Webster County
text:
227.486.  Army SGT Timothy J Sutton Memorial Highway designated for portion of U.S. Highway 60 in Webster County. — The portion of U.S. State Highway 60 from CRD Mockingbird Road continuing east to State Highway PP in Webster County shall be designated as the "Army SGT Timothy J Sutton Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 258)
